title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #8, Raizo, Nami, Unknown person #9, Orochi, Unknown person #10 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is... the power of... the man killer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is that why you were called that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't act like that was your plan!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on!? The banquet Hall is in Shambles!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hanzo fell down from the attic....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: those two kunoichi... who are they... and where did they come from!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Wow! Feel my O vengeance, O-Nami!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why!? I came here to help you!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 25 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
